sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 729 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.25 & 26. 2. For orders on CMA No.400/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 27.02.2026 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for the applicant. 1. Deferred. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Per learned counsel, questions proposed for determination have already been settled against application department by the superior courts, therefore, reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
